content: Phase 4 Arbitrage Engine build prompt received. 4 sequential sub-prompts (4-A through 4-D). Fully specified with exact code, single domain (Rust backend crates). Using single-worker shortcut: Orchestrator -> Backend Dev directly. Known deviations: MockState import paths need mock:: prefix, DB methods return anyhow::Result.

Delegating full Phase 4 build (4-A -> 4-B -> 4-C -> 4-D) to Backend Dev with adapted domain: projects/arbitrage-trader/crates/**. Worker instructed to execute sequentially, verify after each sub-prompt, adapt imports to real codebase.

Phase 4 complete. 12 files created/modified. 149 workspace tests pass (13 engine with mock feature). Clippy clean. 4 deviations: (1) moved async calls before RwLock to avoid clippy await_holding_lock, (2) removed unused Decimal import, (3) rewrote kalshi failure test with FailOnPlaceKalshi wrapper due to one-shot failure consumption by get_balance, (4) restructured feature-gated imports.

Independent verification: cargo test --workspace = 149 tests pass. cargo test -p arb-engine --features mock = 13 tests pass. cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings = zero warnings. All Phase 4 acceptance criteria met.
